item.title: About
item.description: 🎓 I am Berke Aslan, an MSc student in Operations Research at the University of Groningen in the Netherlands. I previously earned a BSc in Econometrics and Operations Research from the same university. In addition to my master’s degree courses, I am currently taking numerous ML and STEM courses. I supplement anything I don’t learn at university by reading literature found online. Anything that I find worth sharing, reinforces my learning, or fosters my creativity is published as a post on this website.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Hey! This will be the first post on my new website. As you have probably read on the landing page, this website will primarily be used for showcasing my ML learning notes. Next to that, I hope to publish some other posts with a heavy focus on STEM. This can be anything really: from data structures and algorithms in Python (or C), to proofs of convergence of the conjugate gradient method. Nothing is out of the ordinary.
